commit_message:
[otp_ctrl] Regenerate top and CSRs

Signed-off-by: Michael Schaffner <msf@opentitan.org>
pull_title: [otp_ctrl] Simplify and consolidate OTP error codes
pull_body:
This is an attempt to consolidate the OTP error codes and simplify the OTP error reporting.
In particular, the number of codes has been reduced from 15 to 8. This should lessen the burden on DV somewhat, and it streamlines the error codes CSR, since all partition/DAI/LCI error codes now fit into a single 32bit word.

@cindychip @mcy sorry for yet another CSR change. Let me know if this works for you.

Note that this also fixes the TL-UL window sizes (as reported in https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/issues/3797).
patch:
@@ -1013,8 +1013,8 @@ module top_earlgrey #(
       .intr_otp_operation_done_o (intr_otp_ctrl_otp_operation_done),
       .intr_otp_error_o          (intr_otp_ctrl_otp_error),
 
-      // [10]: otp_fatal_error
-      // [11]: otp_check_failed
+      // [10]: otp_macro_failure
+      // [11]: otp_check_failure
       .alert_tx_o  ( alert_tx[11:10] ),
       .alert_rx_i  ( alert_rx[11:10] ),
Issue Body: Hi Michael,    There are three issues I wanted to confirm with you:    1). Looks like status register implementation does not match the hjson description.    RTL implementation: https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/blob/master/hw/ip/otp_ctrl/rtl/otp_ctrl.sv#L216  ```    assign hw2reg.status = {chk_pending,                            dai_idle,                            key_deriv_fsm_err,                            scrmbl_fsm_err,                            lfsr_fsm_err,                            chk_timeout,                            part_errors_reduced};  ```  Hjson description: https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/blob/master/hw/ip/otp_ctrl/data/otp_ctrl.hjson#L226  ```        fields: [          { bits: "0"            name: "CREATOR_SW_CFG_ERROR"            desc: '''                  Set to 1 if an error occurred in this partition.                  If set to 1, SW should check the !!ERR_CODE register at the corresponding index.                  '''          }          { bits: "1"            name: "OWNER_SW_CFG_ERROR"            desc: '''                  Set to 1 if an error occurred in this partition.                  If set to 1, SW should check the !!ERR_CODE register at the corresponding index.                  '''          }          { bits: "2"            name: "HW_CFG_ERROR"            desc: '''                  Set to 1 if an error occurred in this partition.                  If set to 1, SW should check the !!ERR_CODE register at the corresponding index.                  '''          }  ```    Do you mind aligning them?    2). SW access windows:  In sw partition in RTL, I saw the size for creator_sw_partition is 768 -> (hex `'h300`), but in TLUL hjson file, the window size is `'h256`. Seems like it is not enough to store all the sw memories.    3). When I tried to read out sw partition (creator and owner) from the TLUL window, I got a timeout.  Seems like tlul `tl_o` ready signal is never asserted. I think you might want to add a   ```  tlul_rvalid = 1'b1;  ```  under state `ReadWaitSt`: https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/blob/master/hw/ip/otp_ctrl/rtl/otp_ctrl_part_unbuf.sv#L227    4). One very small nit thing if you do not mind patch it: https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/blob/master/hw/ip/otp_ctrl/rtl/otp_ctrl_part_unbuf.sv#L221  This line has two duplicated `()`.
Comments: msfschaffner: Thanks @cindychip. All these points should be fixed in the PR linked above. cindychip: close it via PR #3843 and #3834
